title: Dennis Sceviour
text: Home * People * Dennis Sceviour Dennis Sceviour , a Canadian avocational computer chess programmer and author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol compliant chess engine Schooner , released in 2015 [1] . He already started chess programming in the late 70s, and followed Bob Hyatt's Crafty development during his dormant programming years [2] .
